articles.title: Gold Rises on Chinese Trading With US-Iran Tensions in Focus
articles.snippet: Gold and silver rose as the Shanghai Futures Exchange’s night session began, with a US military build-up in the Middle East keeping markets on edge.

combined_text:
[0.33] Gold Rises on Chinese Trading With US-Iran Tensions in Focus
Gold and silver rose as the Shanghai Futures Exchange’s night session began, with a US military build-up in the Middle East keeping markets on edge.
